settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset to default settings?

basicSettings.title: General Settings
basicSettings.languageDesc: Select the display language for the interface
basicSettings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Minimize to system tray instead of exiting when closing the window
basicSettings.autoScrollDesc: Terminal automatically scrolls to latest output
basicSettings.autoScrollToastDesc: Show notification when auto scroll is enabled
basicSettings.autoScrollOnFocusDesc: Automatically enable auto scroll when clicking on terminal area
basicSettings.autoScrollAfterSendDesc: Automatically disable auto scroll after sending command
basicSettings.autoScrollOnWheelDesc: Scroll up to pause auto scroll, scroll to bottom to resume
basicSettings.maxDisplayTextDesc: Auto clear terminal when text size exceeds this limit (MB)
basicSettings.autoBackupDesc: Automatically backup connections and command configurations
basicSettings.backupIntervalDesc: Interval in days for automatic backup
basicSettings.preventSleep: Prevent Screen Sleep and System Hibernate
basicSettings.preventSleepDesc: Prevent system from entering hibernate or screen from closing
basicSettings.restoreListDesc: Select a backup date and click restore to replace current user data
basicSettings.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore from backup {date}? All current user data will be replaced!
basicSettings.restoreSuccess: Successfully restored from backup {date}, please restart the app to take effect

serialSettings.title: Serial COM Settings
serialSettings.supportedBaudRatesDesc: Manage available baud rates for serial connection
serialSettings.showPortTypeDesc: Show type labels in port list (Virtual, USB, Bluetooth)
serialSettings.atLeastOneRate: At least one baud rate must be kept
serialSettings.invalidBaudRate: Please enter a valid baud rate

logSettings.title: Log Storage
logSettings.enableLogStorageDesc: Save terminal output to log files
logSettings.dirNameHint: Tip: Directory path also supports filename template placeholders (%C, %Y, %M, %D, etc.), auto-resolved on connect
logSettings.logSplitSizeDesc: Split log file when size exceeds this limit (MB)

syntaxSettings.title: Syntax Highlight
syntaxSettings.enableSyntaxHighlightDesc: Apply syntax coloring to command output
syntaxSettings.deleteGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete rule group "{name}"?
syntaxSettings.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
syntaxSettings.noRuleGroups: No rule groups, click the button above to add
syntaxSettings.noRules: No rules, click the top right button to add
syntaxSettings.selectGroupHint: Select a rule group from the left panel
syntaxSettings.invalidJsonFile: File is not a valid JSON format
syntaxSettings.noHighlightRulesFound: No highlight rules found in the file
syntaxSettings.importSuperComSuccess: Successfully imported {imported} rule groups, skipped {skipped} duplicates
syntaxSettings.importSuperComAllSkipped: All {skipped} rule groups already exist, skipped

searchSettings.title: Search Settings (Not Implemented)
searchSettings.caseSensitiveDesc: Distinguish English letter case when searching

historySettings.title: Command History
historySettings.commandHistoryMaxCountDesc: Maximum number of sent command history records per protocol, older records are automatically overwritten
historySettings.showCommandHistoryDesc: Automatically show command history popup when typing, disable to hide the popup

tabs.tabPinned: This tab is pinned, please unpin first

dialog.connectionExists: This connection already exists, please modify the connection name or address
dialog.completeForm: Please complete the form and correct errors
dialog.loadFailed: Failed to load connections, please restart the application

comTerminal.placeholder: Enter command and press Enter to send...

notification.logSplitMessage: "{name}" log exceeded split size, new log file: {file}
notification.textClearedMessage: "{name}" log exceeded display limit, cleared current text (log file preserved)
notification.autoScrollStoppedMessage: "{name}" terminal auto-scroll has been stopped, no longer scrolling to latest output
notification.importFromSuperComSuccess: Successfully imported {imported} commands ({groups} groups) from SuperCom, skipped {skipped} duplicates
